EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT LICATA, FRANCESCO ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-16-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-16-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AN DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,875.00 FILED BY NEW, ILSON W. AS TO DEFENDANT LICATA, FRANCESCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2010 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-08-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LICATA, FRANCESCO

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEW, ILSON W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LICATA, FRANCESCO $2,096.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,206.00, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S BILLING WERE BASED ON AN HOURLY RATE OF $220.00. THE JUDGMENT INCLUDES CREDIT FOR ALL OF DEFENDANT'S PAYMENTS ON ACCOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
